nicknames: The Mecca of Canadian Harness Racing

main_track.bias_notes: A massive 7/8-mile oval with sweeping, banked turns and a grueling 1,095-foot home straight. No passing lane means drivers must pull and race actively.
main_track.post_bias: Posts 4, 5, and 6 are statistically most dominant. Post 1 can be a trap if the horse lacks early gate speed.

handicapping_angles.the_bullring_tax: Heavily downgrade horses shipping in from half-mile tracks who are used to short stretches.
handicapping_angles.first_over_grinders: Because there is no passing lane, heavily upgrade horses with proven 'First-Over' (uncovered) grit and stamina.
